    19	  text: 100,

    22	  textFaint: 25,

    31	function parseHex(hex: string): [number, number, number] {
    32	  return [
    33	    parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16),
    34	    parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16),
    35	    parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16),
    36	  ]
    37	}
    38	
    39	function toHex(r: number, g: number, b: number): string {
    40	  const clamp = (v: number) => Math.round(Math.max(0, Math.min(255, v)))
    41	  return `#${clamp(r).toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${clamp(g).toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${clamp(b).toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}`
    42	}
    43	
    44	function mix(fg: string, bg: string, percent: number): string {
    45	  const [fR, fG, fB] = parseHex(fg)
    46	  const [bR, bG, bB] = parseHex(bg)
    47	  const p = percent / 100
    48	  return toHex(fR * p + bR * (1 - p), fG * p + bG * (1 - p), fB * p + bB * (1 - p))
    49	}
    50	
    51	export interface ThemeTokens {
    52	  bg: string

    65	export function deriveTokens(bg: string, fg: string): ThemeTokens {

     1	import type { ColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2	import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     3	import { useEffect, useId, useState } from 'react'
     4	
     5	import { darkTheme, darkTokens, lightTheme, lightTokens } from './mermaid-theme'
     6	import { postProcessMermaidSvg } from './svg-post-process'
     7	
     8	export function useMermaidRender(
     9	  content: string,
    10	  preferredColorScheme?: ColorScheme,
    11	) {
    12	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    13	  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    14	  const [svg, setSvg] = useState('')
    15	  const [width, setWidth] = useState<number>()
    16	  const [height, setHeight] = useState<number>()
    17	
    18	  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    19	  const effectiveColorScheme = preferredColorScheme ?? colorScheme
    20	  const id = useId().split(':').join('')
    21	
    22	  useEffect(() => {
    23	    if (!content) return
    24	    setError('')
    25	    setLoading(true)
    26	
    27	    let cancelled = false
    28	
    29	    import('mermaid').then(async (mo) => {
    30	      const mermaid = mo.default
    31	      const themeConfig =
    32	        effectiveColorScheme === 'dark' ? darkTheme : lightTheme
    33	      const tokens =
    34	        effectiveColorScheme === 'dark' ? darkTokens : lightTokens
    35	
    36	      mermaid.initialize({
    37	        startOnLoad: false,
    38	        theme: themeConfig.theme,
    39	        themeVariables: themeConfig.themeVariables,
    40	        darkMode: effectiveColorScheme === 'dark',
    41	        flowchart: {
    42	          htmlLabels: true,
    43	          curve: 'basis',
    44	          padding: 20,
    45	          nodeSpacing: 24,
    46	          rankSpacing: 48,
    47	        },
    48	        sequence: {
    49	          actorMargin: 80,
    50	          messageMargin: 40,
    51	        },
    52	        gantt: {
    53	          titleTopMargin: 16,
    54	          barHeight: 24,
    55	          barGap: 6,
    56	        },
    57	      })
    58	
    59	      let result
    60	      try {
    61	        result = await mermaid.render(`mermaid-${id}`, content)
    62	      } catch (err) {
    63	        document.getElementById(`dmermaid-${id}`)?.remove()
    64	        if (err instanceof Error) {
    65	          setError(err.message)
    66	        }
    67	        setSvg('')
    68	        setWidth(undefined)
    69	        setHeight(undefined)
    70	      }
    71	
    72	      if (cancelled) return
    73	
    74	      if (result) {
    75	        // Apply beautiful-mermaid inspired visual post-processing
    76	        const processedSvg = postProcessMermaidSvg(result.svg, tokens)
    77	
    78	        setSvg(processedSvg)
    79	        const match = processedSvg.match(/viewBox="[^"]*\s([\d.]+)\s([\d.]+)"/)
    80	        if (match?.[1] && match?.[2]) {
    81	          setWidth(Number.parseInt(match[1]))
    82	          setHeight(Number.parseInt(match[2]))
    83	        }
    84	        setError('')
    85	      }
    86	      setLoading(false)
    87	    })
    88	
    89	    return () => {
    90	      cancelled = true
    91	    }
    92	  }, [id, content, effectiveColorScheme])
    93	
    94	  let imgSrc = ''
    95	  if (svg) {
    96	    const encoder = new TextEncoder()
    97	    const data = encoder.encode(svg)
    98	    imgSrc = `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${btoa(String.fromCodePoint(...new Uint8Array(data)))}`
    99	  }
   100	
   101	  return { loading, error, imgSrc, svg, width, height }
   102	}

     1	/**
     2	 * SVG post-processing pipeline inspired by beautiful-mermaid-playground.
     3	 *
     4	 * After mermaid renders SVG, this module injects visual overrides:
     5	 *   - CSS custom property system for theming
     6	 *   - "Soft" subgraph styling (subtle fills, font weights)
     7	 *   - "Subtle" edge label styling (rounded bg, border)
     8	 *   - Corner rounding ("soft" preset)
     9	 *   - Consistent stroke widths and linecaps
    10	 *
    11	 * @see https://github.com/Justineo/beautiful-mermaid-playground
    12	 */
    13	
    14	import type { ThemeTokens } from './mermaid-theme'
    15	
    16	// Corner radius presets (matching beautiful-mermaid's "soft" preset)
    17	const CORNER_RADIUS = {
    18	  node: 5,
    19	  classNode: 4,
    20	  entity: 5,
    21	  subgraphOuter: 7,
    22	  subgraphHeader: 6,
    23	  actor: 6,
    24	  activation: 4,
    25	} as const
    26	
    27	function applyCornerRounding(doc: Document): void {
    28	  const applyRadius = (selector: string, radius: number) => {
    29	    const rects = doc.querySelectorAll<SVGRectElement>(selector)
    30	    for (const rect of rects) {
    31	      rect.setAttribute('rx', String(radius))
    32	      rect.setAttribute('ry', String(radius))
    33	    }
    34	  }
    35	
    36	  // Flowchart nodes
    37	  applyRadius('.node > rect', CORNER_RADIUS.node)
    38	  applyRadius('.node > .basic', CORNER_RADIUS.node)
    39	
    40	  // Class diagram nodes
    41	  applyRadius('.classGroup > rect', CORNER_RADIUS.classNode)
    42	
    43	  // ER diagram entities
    44	  applyRadius('.er > rect', CORNER_RADIUS.entity)
    45	
    46	  // Subgraph/cluster
    47	  applyRadius('.cluster > rect', CORNER_RADIUS.subgraphOuter)
    48	
    49	  // Sequence diagram actors
    50	  applyRadius('.actor', CORNER_RADIUS.actor)
    51	
    52	  // Activations
    53	  applyRadius('.activation0, .activation1, .activation2', CORNER_RADIUS.activation)
    54	}
    55	
    56	function buildVisualCss(tokens: ThemeTokens): string {
    57	  return `
    58	    /* beautiful-mermaid inspired visual overrides */
    59	
    60	    /* Font hierarchy */
    61	    text {
    62	      font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif !important;
    63	    }
    64	
    65	    /* Edge styling: rounded linecaps for clean connections */
    66	    .edgePath path.path,
    67	    .flowchart-link,

     1	import type { ColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2	import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     3	import { useEffect, useId, useState } from 'react'
     4	
     5	import { darkTheme, lightTheme } from './mermaid-theme'
     6	
     7	export function useMermaidRender(
     8	  content: string,
     9	  preferredColorScheme?: ColorScheme,
    10	) {
    11	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    12	  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    13	  const [svg, setSvg] = useState('')
    14	  const [width, setWidth] = useState<number>()
    15	  const [height, setHeight] = useState<number>()
    16	
    17	  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    18	  const effectiveColorScheme = preferredColorScheme ?? colorScheme
    19	  const id = useId().split(':').join('')
    20	
    21	  useEffect(() => {
    22	    if (!content) return
    23	    setError('')
    24	    setLoading(true)
    25	
    26	    let cancelled = false
    27	
    28	    import('mermaid').then(async (mo) => {
    29	      const mermaid = mo.default
    30	      const themeConfig =
    31	        effectiveColorScheme === 'dark' ? darkTheme : lightTheme
    32	
    33	      mermaid.initialize({
    34	        startOnLoad: false,
    35	        theme: themeConfig.theme,
    36	        themeVariables: themeConfig.themeVariables,
    37	        darkMode: effectiveColorScheme === 'dark',
    38	        flowchart: {
    39	          htmlLabels: true,
    40	          curve: 'basis',
    41	          padding: 16,
    42	        },
    43	        sequence: {
    44	          actorMargin: 80,
    45	          messageMargin: 40,
    46	        },
    47	        gantt: {
    48	          titleTopMargin: 16,
    49	          barHeight: 24,
    50	          barGap: 6,
    51	        },
    52	      })
    53	
    54	      let result
    55	      try {
    56	        result = await mermaid.render(`mermaid-${id}`, content)
    57	      } catch (err) {
    58	        document.getElementById(`dmermaid-${id}`)?.remove()
    59	        if (err instanceof Error) {
    60	          setError(err.message)
    61	        }
    62	        setSvg('')
    63	        setWidth(undefined)
    64	        setHeight(undefined)
    65	      }
    66	
    67	      if (cancelled) return
    68	
    69	      if (result) {
    70	        setSvg(result.svg)
    71	        const match = result.svg.match(/viewBox="[^"]*\s([\d.]+)\s([\d.]+)"/)
    72	        if (match?.[1] && match?.[2]) {
    73	          setWidth(Number.parseInt(match[1]))
    74	          setHeight(Number.parseInt(match[2]))
    75	        }
    76	        setError('')
    77	      }
    78	      setLoading(false)
    79	    })
    80	
    81	    return () => {
    82	      cancelled = true
    83	    }
    84	  }, [id, content, effectiveColorScheme])
    85	
    86	  let imgSrc = ''
    87	  if (svg) {
    88	    const encoder = new TextEncoder()
    89	    const data = encoder.encode(svg)
    90	    imgSrc = `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${btoa(String.fromCodePoint(...new Uint8Array(data)))}`
    91	  }
    92	
    93	  return { loading, error, imgSrc, svg, width, height }
    94	}
